name: io.github.Cam10001110101/mcp-server-ollama-deep-researcher
description: MCP server for deep research using Ollama LLMs with web search APIs (Tavily, Perplexity, Exa). Supports configurable research loops, LLM models, and search APIs with status tracking and resource access.

environmentVariables.description: Tavily API key for web search
environmentVariables.name: TAVILY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Perplexity API key for web search
environmentVariables.name: PERPLEXITY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Exa API key for web search
environmentVariables.name: EXA_API_KEY
